policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-ai-02 - Use a managed identity'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+AI+services#IncidentremediationAIservices#drcp-ai-02 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP AI services Use a managed identity
policyDefinition.description: This policy ensures that AI service has a managed identity. Managed service identity provides improved security by not using secrets from other services, such as credentials in connection strings. When registering with Microsoft Entra ID, the instance connects to other Azure services securely without the need for usernames and passwords.

metadata.description: Enable or disable the execution of the policy
